description: Active and recently-active working groups, councils, and study groups shaping Japanese corporate governance reform. Data compiled from FSA, JPX/TSE, METI, SSBJ, and MoJ primary sources. Powers the 'What the Working Groups Are Doing Now' dashboard at jpinv.com.

groups.name_en: Council of Experts Concerning the Follow-up of Japan's Stewardship Code and Japan's Corporate Governance Code
groups.name_ja: スチュワードシップ・コード及びコーポレートガバナンス・コードのフォローアップ会議
groups.short_name_ja: 金融庁フォローアップ会議
groups.chair: Hideki Kanda (Emeritus Professor, University of Tokyo)
groups.mandate_en: Joint FSA/TSE standing body that supervises both the Stewardship Code and the Corporate Governance Code; produces the annual 'Action Programme for Corporate Governance Reform'; identifies priority reforms that feed into Code revisions and TSE rule-making.

recent_outputs.title_en: Action Programme for Corporate Governance Reform 2025
30th Meeting of the Council of Experts
Action Programme for Corporate Governance Reform 2024: Principles into Practice
29th Meeting of the Council of Experts
Action Program for Accelerating Corporate Governance Reform: From Form to Substance

upcoming.title_en: 31st plenary meeting (expected, to review Expert Panel CG Code revision draft)
Action Programme for Corporate Governance Reform 2026

groups.name_en: Expert Panel on the Revision of the Corporate Governance Code (2025-2026)
groups.name_ja: コーポレートガバナンス・コードの改訂に関する有識者会議
groups.short_name_ja: CGコード改訂有識者会議
groups.chair: Hideki Kanda (Emeritus Professor, University of Tokyo)
groups.mandate_en: Joint FSA/TSE expert panel established October 2025 to draft the fourth revision of Japan's Corporate Governance Code. Focuses on streamlining, integrating cost-of-capital management, aligning with SSBJ sustainability disclosure, and strengthening board-effectiveness and engagement principles.

recent_outputs.title_en: Draft revisions to the Corporate Governance Code for public consultation
3rd Meeting of the Expert Panel
2nd Meeting of the Expert Panel
1st Meeting of the Expert Panel (launch)

upcoming.title_en: Public consultation comment deadline on draft revised CG Code
Finalisation of CG Code 4.0 (revised text)
4th Meeting to consider public comments and finalise revisions

groups.name_en: Expert Panel on the Stewardship Code
groups.name_ja: スチュワードシップ・コードに関する有識者検討会
groups.short_name_ja: スチュワードシップ有識者検討会
groups.chair: Hideki Kanda (Emeritus Professor, University of Tokyo)
groups.mandate_en: Drafting and revision body for Japan's Stewardship Code. Drafted the revised Stewardship Code v3.0 (third revision) published 26 June 2025, which promotes collective/collaborative engagement and increases transparency of beneficial shareholders.

recent_outputs.title_en: Stewardship-Code-related Large Shareholding clarification
Finalisation of Japan's Stewardship Code (Third revision)
Draft revisions to the Stewardship Code for public consultation
3rd Meeting of the Expert Panel (2024 round)

upcoming.title_en: Possible reconvening for guidance follow-up; signatories required to update disclosures by end-December 2025

groups.name_en: Council of Experts Concerning the Follow-up of Market Restructuring
groups.name_ja: 市場区分の見直しに関するフォローアップ会議
groups.short_name_ja: TSE市場区分フォローアップ会議
groups.mandate_en: Post-2022 market-restructuring iterative governance body. Drives TSE rule-making and 'requests' to listed companies. Produced the March 2023 cost-of-capital/PBR request, the English-disclosure mandate, the Growth Market revisions, and the parent-subsidiary case-study collection.

recent_outputs.title_en: 27th Council of Experts Meeting
TSE Material on Cost of Capital and Listed Subsidiaries
Case Studies of Companies' Initiatives Toward Issue Resolution (Cost of Capital)
Compilation of Case Studies on Parent-Subsidiary Listings
Revision to the Growth Market's Continued Listing Criteria
Future Initiatives on Cost-of-Capital Conscious Management

upcoming.title_en: 28th Council of Experts Meeting (expected)
Updated Status Report on Cost-of-Capital Conscious Management (annual)
Second-stage TOPIX revision begins: TOPIX selected by liquidity, not segment

groups.name_en: Study Group to Review Minority Shareholder Protection and other Framework of Quasi-Controlled Listed Companies
groups.name_ja: 従属上場会社における少数株主保護の在り方等に関する研究会
groups.short_name_en: TSE Quasi-Controlled Listed Companies Study Group
groups.mandate_en: Academic-investor-issuer working group on minority shareholder protection at listed companies with substantial-control ownership structures (parent-listed subsidiaries, founder-controlled companies, quasi-controlled companies holding 20-50%). Feeds into TSE case-study publications and CG Code revision.

recent_outputs.title_en: TSE Compilation of Case Studies on Parent-Subsidiary Listings
The Investor's Perspective on Parent-Subsidiary Listings
Interim Report on Quasi-Controlled Listed Companies

upcoming.title_en: Updated guidance / further case studies on quasi-controlled structures
Next study group session (expected)

groups.name_en: Working Group on Corporate Disclosure of the Financial System Council
groups.name_ja: 金融審議会ディスクロージャーワーキング・グループ
groups.short_name_ja: 金融審議会ディスクロージャーWG
groups.mandate_en: Draft body for Cabinet Office Ordinance amendments to Annual Securities Report (yuho) disclosure requirements. Past outputs include the 2019 narrative-disclosure principles and the per-stock cross-shareholding disclosure template introduced from FY2022.

recent_outputs.title_en: Strategy-Focused Human Capital Disclosures research and guidance
4th meeting of the WG on Corporate Disclosure

upcoming.title_en: 5th Meeting of the Working Group on Corporate Disclosure
Interim recommendations on yuho narrative disclosure refinements

groups.name_en: Working Group on Disclosure and Assurance of Sustainability-related Financial Information of the Financial System Council
groups.name_ja: 金融審議会 サステナビリティ情報の開示・保証のあり方に関するワーキング・グループ
groups.mandate_en: Drafted the roadmap for making SSBJ Standards mandatory in annual securities reports (statutory disclosure). Phased by market cap: ≥JPY 3 trn FY ending March 2027; ≥JPY 1 trn March 2028; ≥JPY 500 bn March 2029. Mandatory third-party assurance begins one year after mandatory disclosure for each phase.

recent_outputs.title_en: Final Report of the Working Group and Japanese Roadmap for Sustainability Disclosures and Assurance
Japanese Roadmap on Sustainability Disclosure and Assurance (English PDF)
11th Meeting of the WG
10th Meeting of the WG
Interim Report and Roadmap for Sustainability Disclosures and Assurance
9th Meeting of the WG

upcoming.title_en: Cabinet Office Ordinance amendments to implement Phase 1 mandatory disclosure
Phase 1 mandatory SSBJ disclosure begins (market cap ≥ JPY 3 trn, ~70 issuers)
Phase 2 mandatory SSBJ disclosure (≥ JPY 1 trn)

groups.name_en: Working Group on Tender Offer Rule and Large Shareholding Reporting Rule of the Financial System Council
groups.name_ja: 金融審議会 公開買付制度・大量保有報告制度等ワーキング・グループ
groups.short_name_en: FSA Tender Offer / Large Shareholding WG
groups.mandate_en: Drafted the 25 December 2023 report recommending modernisation of Japan's tender-offer rules and large-shareholding ('5% rule') reporting. The 2024 FIEA amendments lowered the mandatory-TOB threshold from >1/3 to >30%, brought on-market purchases inside TOB scope, and clarified 'joint holders' / 'acts of material proposal' definitions. Effective 1 May 2026.

recent_outputs.title_en: Report of the Working Group on Tender Offer Rule and Large Shareholding Reporting Rule
FSA Cabinet Office Ordinance finalising 2024 FIEA implementation

upcoming.title_en: 2024 FIEA amendments take effect (new 30% TOB threshold; on-market purchases in scope)
Possible reconvening to review implementation experience

groups.name_ja: 公正な買収の在り方に関する研究会
groups.chair: Hideki Kanda (Emeritus Professor, University of Tokyo)
groups.mandate_en: Drafted the August 2023 'Guidelines for Corporate Takeovers' establishing the bona-fide-offer doctrine. Reconvened 4 February 2026 to update guidance on hostile-takeover countermeasures, preconditional TOBs, and to align with the 2024 FIEA amendments. Aims to publish updated materials by May 2026.

recent_outputs.title_en: 9th Meeting (Reconvening of the Study Group)
Guidelines for Corporate Takeovers
Guidelines for Corporate Takeovers (English reference translation PDF)

upcoming.title_en: 10th Meeting of the Fair Acquisition Study Group
Updated Guidelines / addenda on hostile-takeover countermeasures and preconditional TOBs

groups.name_ja: コーポレート・ガバナンス・システム研究会
groups.mandate_en: Maintains METI's CGS Guidelines (Practical Guidelines for Corporate Governance Systems). Phase 3 ran from November 2021; produced the revised CGS Guidelines and the spun-off 'Guidelines for Nomination and Compensation Committees and Succession Planning' in July 2022.

recent_outputs.title_en: Revised CGS Guidelines + Nomination/Compensation/Succession Supplement
CGS Study Group (Phase 3) launched

upcoming.title_en: Possible Phase 4 launch to refresh CGS Guidelines after CG Code 4.0

groups.name_en: Study Group on Corporate Governance toward the Enhancement of Earning Power
groups.name_ja: 「稼ぐ力」の強化に向けたコーポレートガバナンス研究会
groups.chair: Kunio Ito (Hitotsubashi University; lead of the Ito Review)
groups.mandate_en: Discusses corporate-governance reforms needed to enhance Japanese companies' earning power, and the future direction of Companies Act amendments. Produced the January 2025 Report on the Amendment of the Companies Act and the April 2025 'Five Principles for Board of Directors to Enhance Growth Power'.

recent_outputs.title_en: Five Principles for Board of Directors to Enhance Growth Power
Report on the Amendment of the Companies Act
Study Group launched

upcoming.title_en: Reconvening to follow up Companies Act subcommittee work
Updated guidance on board oversight of capital allocation

groups.name_en: Legislative Council Subcommittee on Companies Act (Shares and Shareholders' Meetings)
groups.name_ja: 法制審議会 会社法制（株式・株主総会等関係）部会
groups.chair: Hideki Kanda (Emeritus Professor, University of Tokyo)
groups.mandate_en: Companies Act amendment drafting body. Examining mandatory beneficial-ownership disclosure regime (UK Section 793 model), virtual-only shareholder meetings, share-class flexibility, and other Companies Act reforms. Expected Companies Act amendment Diet submission 2026-2027.

recent_outputs.title_en: 10th Meeting Minutes
9th Meeting
8th Meeting
Subcommittee launched (1st meeting)

upcoming.title_en: 11th Meeting (continued deliberations on beneficial-ownership regime)
Interim Report on Companies Act amendment
Expected Companies Act amendment Diet submission

groups.name_en: Sustainability Standards Board of Japan (SSBJ) Board
groups.name_ja: サステナビリティ基準委員会
groups.mandate_en: Standard-setting body for Japan's sustainability disclosure standards. Mirrors the ISSB. Holds monthly public Board meetings. Supported by technical committees on climate disclosure, general disclosure, and an SSBJ Advisory Forum. Due Process Oversight Committee at FASF level.

recent_outputs.title_en: Amendments to SSBJ Standards (GHG Emissions Disclosures aligning with IFRS S2 amendments)
Inaugural SSBJ Sustainability Disclosure Standards (3 standards: Universal, General, Climate)

upcoming.title_en: Monthly SSBJ Board meeting (public)
Exposure Drafts addressing implementation feedback
Implementation guidance for Phase 1 issuers (March 2027 first filings)

groups.name_ja: サステナブルファイナンス有識者会議
groups.short_name_ja: サステナブルファイナンス有識者会議
groups.mandate_en: Establishes Japan's sustainable-finance policy framework, including the Basic Guidelines on Climate Transition Finance, ESG-evaluation provider code of conduct, impact investing principles, and supports the SSBJ disclosure mandate from the financial-system side.

recent_outputs.title_en: Basic Guidelines on Climate Transition Finance

Updated Sustainable Finance progress report
